claim_boundary: These masked variants preserve underlying tasks while changing surface form so the augmentation court can reject shortcut routing.

rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can stop at a locally good answer without pricing downstream failure cost.
rows.objective: Sequence-heavy operating choice where a locally good answer causes a later rollback or dependency break.
rows.prompt: masked_of=STRATEGIST_CONSEQUENCE_CHAIN__DOWNSTREAM_ORDER_BREAK; mask_style=DOMAIN_SKIN_SHIFT; preserve_objective=Sequence-heavy operating choice where a locally good answer causes a later rollback or dependency break.; rewrite_surface_only=true; maintain_expected_policy=ROUTE_TO_SPECIALIST

rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can stop at a locally good answer without pricing downstream failure cost.
rows.objective: Plan under temporal distortion where the wrong order raises recovery cost even if the immediate step looks plausible.
rows.prompt: masked_of=STRATEGIST_CONSEQUENCE_CHAIN__SEQUENCED_ROLLBACK_COST; mask_style=EVIDENCE_ORDER_INVERSION; preserve_objective=Plan under temporal distortion where the wrong order raises recovery cost even if the immediate step looks plausible.; rewrite_surface_only=true; maintain_expected_policy=ROUTE_TO_SPECIALIST

rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can sound acceptable while underpricing receipt gaps, policy breaks, or overclaim risk.
rows.objective: Task where admissibility can still be recovered if the route prioritizes receipt discipline over surface plausibility.
rows.prompt: masked_of=AUDITOR_ADMISSIBILITY_FAIL_CLOSED__PROOF_CHAIN_REPAIR; mask_style=VOICE_AND_FORMAT_SHIFT; preserve_objective=Task where admissibility can still be recovered if the route prioritizes receipt discipline over surface plausibility.; rewrite_surface_only=true; maintain_expected_policy=ROUTE_TO_SPECIALIST

rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can sound acceptable while underpricing receipt gaps, policy breaks, or overclaim risk.
rows.objective: Governed execution case where a specialist should catch a hidden admissibility breach before action continues.
rows.prompt: masked_of=AUDITOR_ADMISSIBILITY_FAIL_CLOSED__ADMISSIBILITY_BREACH_TRIAGE; mask_style=DOMAIN_CAMOUFLAGE; preserve_objective=Governed execution case where a specialist should catch a hidden admissibility breach before action continues.; rewrite_surface_only=true; maintain_expected_policy=ROUTE_TO_SPECIALIST

rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can overcommit to the first clean framing instead of holding a live rival interpretation.
rows.objective: Decision memo where the safer answer depends on keeping a rival framing alive instead of collapsing to the first clean narrative.
rows.prompt: masked_of=BETA_SECOND_ORDER_REFRAME__RIVAL_FRAME_PRESERVATION; mask_style=DOMAIN_SKIN_SHIFT; preserve_objective=Decision memo where the safer answer depends on keeping a rival framing alive instead of collapsing to the first clean narrative.; rewrite_surface_only=true; maintain_expected_policy=ROUTE_TO_SPECIALIST

rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can overcommit to the first clean framing instead of holding a live rival interpretation.
rows.objective: Second-order reinterpretation task where alpha’s first framing looks neat but hides the more decisive branch.
rows.prompt: masked_of=BETA_SECOND_ORDER_REFRAME__SECOND_ORDER_COUNTERREAD; mask_style=EVIDENCE_ORDER_INVERSION; preserve_objective=Second-order reinterpretation task where alpha’s first framing looks neat but hides the more decisive branch.; rewrite_surface_only=true; maintain_expected_policy=ROUTE_TO_SPECIALIST

rows.abstention_reason: Abstention control remains the rightful fail-closed response.
rows.alpha_liability: Forced commitment under high ambiguity can cost more than lawful abstention.
rows.objective: Boundary-heavy case where the only lawful result is still abstention with explicit review handoff.
rows.prompt: family_id=BOUNDARY_ABSTENTION_CONTROL; control_case=true; masked=true; expected_policy=ABSTAIN_FOR_REVIEW; objective=Boundary-heavy case where the only lawful result is still abstention with explicit review handoff.
rows.review_handoff_rule: Escalate to manual review before action.

rows.alpha_liability: No liability should be asserted on true static-control families.
rows.objective: Clean static-hold case where any extra routing would be pure regression.
rows.prompt: family_id=STATIC_NO_ROUTE_CONTROL; control_case=true; masked=true; expected_policy=STAY_STATIC_BASELINE; objective=Clean static-hold case where any extra routing would be pure regression.
rows.static_baseline_reason: Static control remains the rightful no-route hold.
